title: Outbound truck delayed at gate 7
description: Carrier called to report a 55 minute delay. The loading bay is blocked by a previous trailer and the planned departure window may be missed.

title: Missing customs document for Germany shipment
description: Shipment DE-8842 is physically ready, but the customs document is missing from the transport folder. Truck departure is scheduled in 40 minutes.

title: Unsafe spill near dock 2
description: Warehouse operator reported a liquid spill near dock 2. Loading activity in that area may need to pause until safety review is complete.

title: Afternoon wave capacity shortage
description: The afternoon outbound wave has 18 percent more volume than planned and the current vehicle capacity may not be enough for all pallets.

title: Customer escalation about late delivery
description: Customer is asking for an urgent update because a priority shipment missed the planned departure and affects a production deadline.

title: Damaged pallet found before loading
description: Quality check found visible damage on one pallet assigned to route CZ-41. Team needs a decision before loading continues.

title: Scan mismatch on outbound shipment
description: System scan shows 42 parcels, but physical count shows 41. Shipment cannot be closed until the mismatch is investigated.

title: Driver waiting without loading slot
description: Driver arrived early and has been waiting for 35 minutes. No loading slot is currently available in the dispatch plan.

title: Missing invoice reference in transport plan
description: Transport plan includes a shipment without invoice reference. Admin team needs to confirm whether it can depart today.

title: Emergency exit blocked by empty containers
description: Empty containers are blocking part of the emergency exit path near the staging area. Supervisor requests immediate action.
